english_text: The batter hit a home run
The ball went over the fence
The catcher caught the foul ball
The outfielder made a diving catch
It's the top of the ninth
The umpire called it a strike
Fried chicken and beer at the game
The stadium is beautiful at night
The wave goes around the stadium

romanization: sijeun-eun hangsang seolleyeyoBaseball is more than a game
